extraction.one_line_summary: FREIER Laurens attacked inside 1km to go after bridging late from the break, outsprinting Costa/Rolland/Kangert in the final 400m.
tactical_patterns: ROLLAND Pierre attacked on penultimate climb but KANGERT Rein bridged using drafting advantage, refusing to pull through cooperatively before finale.
COSTA Rui and PETTITI refused to work together despite both chasing, allowing FREIER to bridge solo from distance.
FREIER won from break by attacking inside flamme rouge knowing he lacked sprint speed, going earliest at 400m.

rider_signals.FREIER Laurens: positive: Dömens-Data domestique showed unexpected climbing legs to bridge late and tactical maturity to time long sprint perfectly
rider_signals.PETTITI Giulio: negative: worked hard in chase duo with COSTA but failed to coordinate pulling, surrendering stage win opportunity
rider_signals.KANGERT Rein: neutral: strong enough to bridge to ROLLAND's attack but tactically sat-in refusing pulls, caught at line anyway
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: abandoned stage with mechanical issue (puncture heard on audio)
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: attacked on penultimate climb showing recovered form after strong previous day time trial
